screenshots.title: Knowledge Base — Empty State
screenshots.description: Fresh Knowledge Base with Markdown editor ready for first note. Shows topic sidebar, search, and AI/Save buttons.

screenshots.title: Knowledge Base — Empty State (alt)
screenshots.description: Same as 01, slightly different framing.

screenshots.title: Knowledge Import — Dialog
screenshots.description: Import notes modal with ZIP file chooser and drag-drop area.

screenshots.title: Knowledge Import — File Picker
screenshots.description: macOS file picker showing demo-content.zip selected in the docs folder.

screenshots.title: Knowledge Import — File Selected
screenshots.description: Import dialog with demo-content.zip loaded, ready to import.

screenshots.title: Knowledge Import — Success
screenshots.description: Import complete: '9 notes imported into 5 topics' confirmation message.

screenshots.title: Knowledge Base — Topics Overview
screenshots.description: Knowledge Base with 13 notes organized into 4 topics: Ideas (2), Meeting Notes (2), Research (2), Tasks (2), plus Pending.

screenshots.title: Knowledge Base — Note Detail
screenshots.description: Viewing 'Team Standup Apr 14' note with rendered Markdown. Shows topic tree expanded, note metadata (tags), and full content with attendees, updates by team member, and action items.

screenshots.title: Chat — Welcome Screen
screenshots.description: Fresh chat session with Mycelos logo, tagline, and quick action buttons: 'What can you do?', 'Create a new agent', 'Show my workflows'. Agent Status panel on right shows idle state.

screenshots.title: Chat — Welcome Screen (alt)
screenshots.description: Same as 09, identical framing.

screenshots.title: Chat — User Typing
screenshots.description: User typing 'Hello, how are you?' in the message input. Shows send button highlighted.

screenshots.title: Chat — Thinking Indicator
screenshots.description: Mycelos processing a message with animated 'Mycelos is thinking...' indicator. Processing status shows 'Active' in Agent Status panel.

screenshots.title: Chat — First Response
screenshots.description: Mycelos introduces itself: 'Your data stays local, I use cloud AI as a tool — not as storage.' Shows token count (6912), model (claude-sonnet-4-5), cost ($0.0214), 2 messages.

screenshots.title: Chat — User Typing Name
screenshots.description: User typing 'My name is Stefan.' in response to Mycelos asking for their name.

screenshots.title: Chat — Conversation Flow
screenshots.description: Multi-turn conversation: greeting → introduction → name exchange. Mycelos responds personally: 'Nice to meet you, Stefan!' Shows 4 messages, 7463 tokens, $0.0442 cost.

screenshots.title: Chat — Note Creation Request
screenshots.description: New session. User asks: 'Please add some notes for today's stand up from 16th of April 2026. All projects are on track, and I am going to take care of the quality assurance.'

screenshots.title: Chat — Processing Note Creation
screenshots.description: Mycelos thinking while processing the note creation request. Shows the user message and thinking indicator.

screenshots.title: Chat — Note Created
screenshots.description: Mycelos confirms: 'Done! I've saved your stand-up notes from today.' Then introduces itself and asks for user's name. Shows 14280 tokens, $0.0461.

screenshots.title: Chat — Knowledge Graph Request
screenshots.description: User asks: 'Can you visualize my knowledge as a diagram, please?' — demonstrating natural language diagram generation.

screenshots.title: Chat — Knowledge Graph in Chat
screenshots.description: Mycelos renders an interactive knowledge graph diagram inline in chat. Shows 4 main topics with connected notes. Lists topic breakdown. 17527 tokens, $0.1030.

screenshots.title: Knowledge Graph — Fullscreen
screenshots.description: Interactive knowledge graph in fullscreen overlay. Central 'Knowledge Base' node connected to topics (Meeting Notes, Ideas, Research, Tasks) and their individual notes. Download PNG/SVG buttons visible.

screenshots.title: Workflows — Overview
screenshots.description: 14 registered workflows in card layout: Brainstorming Session, Daily Briefing, Knowledge Organizer, Research & Summary, Welcome Onboarding, check-reminders. Each shows tags, capabilities, step count, and Run button.

screenshots.title: Connectors — Overview
screenshots.description: Connectors page with 3 sections: Channels (Telegram, Slack), Services (Email IMAP/SMTP, Gmail API), MCP Connectors (Browse the Web, Search, Databases, Files, Development, Project Mgmt, Memory). Active connectors: DuckDuckGo, HTTP.

screenshots.title: Settings — LLM Models & Agent Assignments
screenshots.description: Settings page showing LLM Configuration (Haiku, Opus, Sonnet with pricing) and Agent Assignments table mapping agents to models with priority and purpose (classification/execution).

screenshots.title: Settings — Credentials, Language & Config Generations
screenshots.description: Settings page lower section: encrypted credentials (anthropic stored), language selector (English), and Config Generations history showing immutable rollback entries (#58 active, #49-#47 rollback).

screenshots.title: Settings — Add Credential Form
screenshots.description: Credential creation form with fields: Service, Label, Secret (API key or token), Description. Shows existing 'anthropic' credential below.

screenshots.title: Quick Capture — Cmd+K Overlay
screenshots.description: Quick Capture overlay (triggered by Cmd+K) floating over the chat. Input field: 'Capture a thought, task, or reminder...' with Esc to cancel, Enter to save.

duplicates.reason: 14 only adds cursor in input, 13 shows the more interesting response
